fields.name: request_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the hardship request

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the request was made

fields.name: source_department
fields.description: The department that originated the hardship request

fields.name: target_department
fields.description: The department that will process the hardship request

fields.name: customer_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the customer making the request

fields.name: customer_name
fields.description: The name of the customer making the hardship request

fields.name: account_number
fields.description: Account number associated with the customer's account

fields.name: request_type
fields.description: Type of hardship request being made (e.g. payment reduction)

fields.name: hardship_reason
fields.description: Reason for the hardship request (e.g. job loss)

fields.name: hardship_severity
fields.description: Severity of the hardship (e.g. high)

fields.name: monthly_income
fields.description: Monthly income of the customer making the request

fields.name: monthly_expenses
fields.description: Monthly expenses of the customer making the request

fields.name: outstanding_balance
fields.description: Outstanding balance on the account associated with the customer's request

fields.name: monthly_payment_amount
fields.description: Monthly payment amount requested by the customer

fields.name: requested_relief_type
fields.description: Types of relief requested by the customer (e.g. payment reduction)

children.name: relief_type
children.description: Type of relief requested (e.g. payment reduction)

fields.name: requested_duration_months
fields.description: Duration of the requested relief in months

fields.name: supporting_documents
fields.description: List of supporting documents provided by the customer (e.g. redundancy notice)

children.name: document_name
children.description: Name of the supporting document (e.g. redundancy notice)

fields.name: contact_number
fields.description: Contact number of the customer making the request

fields.name: contact_email
fields.description: Email address of the customer making the request

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Priority level assigned to the hardship request (e.g. normal)

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the hardship request (e.g. pending_credit_review)
